name: Dialog
description: A window overlaid on the primary window, rendering content in a layer above the page.
whenToUse: Use for forms, confirmations, detailed views, settings panels, and any content that needs focused attention.

props.name: modal
props.description: Whether the dialog should block interaction with the page
